summary: Carrier-only closeout review accepts LODE-149 terminal metadata and idle pointer sync after PR #174 merged, child Work Items and parent FRs closed, and milestone #10 closed.
reviewed_validation_summary: loom fact-chain --target . --json; loom verify --target . --json; git diff --check passed locally before carrier closeout PR. Loom verify reports Codex plugin runtime cache stale while CLI/source payload is 0.28.0; treated as host runtime cache surface, not repo code.

semantic_review_disposition.reason: Authored closeout review approved only LODE-149 terminal carrier metadata and idle pointer restoration; implementation behavior was reviewed and merged in PR #174.

implementation_review_disposition.reason: Implementation behavior was reviewed and merged in PR #174; this carrier-only review covers only post-merge closeout metadata.

carrier_only_closeout_review.reason: Closeout changes are limited to LODE-149 terminal metadata, issue/PR/merge evidence, and no_active_item pointer restoration.
